overall.summary: Skill direction is correct and trigger fit is strong across all 3 prompts. Current docs are sufficient for high-quality HQ setup guidance, but not yet fully hard-edged for newcomer-perfect replication or for packaging scattered existing materials into a reusable skill.
critical_gaps: Weak bridge from scattered docs to skill/package structure
No explicit minimum runnable demo definition
recommended_v1_1_improvements: Add a minimum directory tree example to references/install-guide.md
Add a 5-step migration guide for converting scattered docs into a skill structure
Add minimum runnable demo requirements to references/acceptance-checklist.md
Explicitly separate HQ build output vs skill/package output in SKILL.md
Provide short examples for task card, blackboard entry, and review record

strengths: Default build order maps well to the request
Install guide and acceptance checklist support newcomer-oriented output
risks: May produce a good plan without a concrete directory scaffold
Four-file kit may remain too abstract for a newcomer
gaps: Missing first live task card example

strengths: Description explicitly covers reusable skill/package packaging
Publish checklist and test prompts provide basic release support
Can guide toward teaching docs and acceptance structure
risks: May answer with generic HQ docs instead of true packaging/migration guidance
May not clarify how to split content between SKILL.md and references
gaps: No migration bridge from scattered docs to skill structure
No explicit content-boundary rule for SKILL.md vs references
No minimum deliverable definition for a reusable package

strengths: Strong alignment with anti-patterns and core sentence
L5 operations layer is directly relevant
Install guide and checklist support the final answer well
risks: Blackboard/review parts may stay conceptual without templates
gaps: No short template hints for blackboard and review mechanism
No explicit minimum runnable system definition

low_risk_changes.change: Added explicit references to references/test-prompts.md and references/publish-checklist.md in Bundled resources
